title: AutoCount Accounting 2.2
description: Desktop accounting software for Malaysian SMEs with SST, e‑Invoice, inventory, sales, purchase, and reporting workflows.

features: Amend all sales reports to display business date instead of created date for POS transaction
Add "Our Invoice No." column at A/R Credit Note 'Our Invoice No.' grid
Support to cache SMTP From Name and From Email by each Database and each User ID
Enhance DocNo to support up till 50 characters
Extend Sales Exemption No field at transaction detail level to 300 characters
Add 'From Email' column in the server mailing list.
Enhancement Purchase Request to Support Unit Price, Currency Code, Total Amount, and Reference Attachments
Enhance auto detect and assign issue date for e-Invoice submission
Remove Phone Validation at transaction level
Enhance Server Mailing List to with Summary Footer
Support to allow edit Tax Entity fields even if already submitted e-Invoice transactions
Support function to change old BRN to new BRN and update e-Invoice License accommodating latest LHDN updates
fixes: Fix Drill down cannot show transaction in Financial Report when Multi Select with Filter Null project
Fix Budget Maintenance and Year To Date Maintenance filter for All Project and All Department does not return any results
Fix "Show Origin Currency" missing in Basic Options of Profit and Loss of Document Report
Fix Item Package Sales Report will prompt SQL error when filter by range on Sales Location combined with another filter on Debtor or Package code
Fix System will display voided documents in the "Post to G/L" function
Fix Edit Invoice or Purchase Invoice and add a new payment, the OR/PV numbering will skip one number even if the 'Payment from IV/PI follows IV/PI No.' option is enabled

Fix when Using "Copy Whole Document" from Invoice with Batch No to Sales Order which does not have Batch No wrongly will automatically insert Batch No of the Invoice when Sales Order transfer to Invoice
Fix when deleting sales agent or purchase agent does not check whether it is referenced in User Maintenance's 'Filter by Agent'
Fix Print Cash Transaction Listing drill down to ARAP document will open as normal Cash Book and copy to new will copy as Cash Book instead of ARAP Payment
Fix system does not automatically prompt the user to update detail location after changing the master location in a Purchase Request
Fix Change Tax Code did not consider Consignment Return and Purchase Consignment Return and will cause error
Fix Incorrect AO Qty for Raw Material in Instant Info and not match with the actual Available Quantity

sections.heading: Key features
body: SST and LHDN e-Invoice ready workflows for Malaysian compliance.
Integrated operations across accounting, POS, inventory, payroll, and custom business workflows.
Prompt technical support from KSL for setup, training, and practical usage questions.
Extensible through plugins, custom fields, scripting, and workflow automation.

sections.heading: Latest release note summary
body: 2.2.31.44 Rev 44 Date: 2026-07-13 Features: Amend all sales reports to display business date instead of created date for POS transaction; Add "Our Invoice No." column at A/R Credit Note 'Our Invoice No.' grid; Support to cache SMTP From Name and From Email by each Database and each User ID; Enhance DocNo to support up till 50 characters; Extend Sales Exemption No field at transaction detail level to 300 characters; Add 'From Email' column in the server mailing list.; Enhancement Purchase Request to Support Unit Price, Currency Code, Total Amount, and Reference Attachments; Enhance auto detect and assign issue date for e-Invoice submission; Remove Phone Validation at transaction level; Enhance Server Mailing List to with Summary Footer; Support to allow edit Tax Entity fields even if already submitted e-Invoice transactions; Support function to change old BRN to new BRN and update e-Invoice License accommodating latest LHDN updates Fixes: Fix Drill down cannot show transaction in Financial Report when Multi Select with Filter Null project; Fix Budget Maintenance and Year To Date Maintenance filter for All Project and All Department does not return any results; Fix "Show Origin Currency" missing in Basic Options of Profit and Loss of Document Report; Fix Item Package Sales Report will prompt SQL error when filter by range on Sales Location combined with another filter on Debtor or Package code; Fix System will display voided documents in the "Post to G/L" function; Fix Edit Invoice or Purchase Invoice and add a new payment, the OR/PV numbering will skip one number even if the 'Payment from IV/PI follows IV/PI No.' option is enabled; Fix when Using "Copy Whole Document" from Invoice with Batch No to Sales Order which does not have Batch No wrongly will automatically insert Batch No of the Invoice when Sales Order transfer to Invoice; Fix when deleting sales agent or purchase agent does not check whether it is referenced in User Maintenance's 'Filter by Agent'; Fix Print Cash Transaction Listing drill down to ARAP document will open as normal Cash Book and copy to new will copy as Cash Book instead of ARAP Payment; Fix system does not automatically prompt the user to update detail location after changing the master location in a Purchase Request; Fix Change Tax Code did not consider Consignment Return and Purchase Consignment Return and will cause error; Fix Incorrect AO Qty for Raw Material in Instant Info and not match with the actual Available Quantity Source: https://wiki.autocountsoft.com/wiki/Release_Note_2.2.31.44
